channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-6959] sanity-quota test_7e: test failed to respond and timed out
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah_lw <wei3.liu@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/e845a31c-3799-11e5-9d53-5254006e85c2.

The sub-test test_7e failed with the following error:

test failed to respond and timed out

client dmesg

[14765.843444] jbd2/vda1-8     D ffff88007fd13680     0   258      2 0x00000000
[14765.843444]  ffff880036703820 0000000000000046 ffff8800787271c0 ffff880036703fd8
[14765.843444]  ffff880036703fd8 ffff880036703fd8 ffff8800787271c0 ffff88007fd13f48
[14765.843444]  ffff880036703920 ffff8800787b2b88 ffff88007fd1ac80 ffff880078768090
[14765.843444] Call Trace:
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff816099ad>] io_schedule+0x9d/0x130
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff812b903f>] bt_get+0x10f/0x1a0
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff81098230>] ? wake_up_bit+0x30/0x30
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff812b93cf>] blk_mq_get_tag+0xbf/0xf0
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff812b521b>] __blk_mq_alloc_request+0x1b/0x1f0
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff812b6b81>] blk_mq_map_request+0x181/0x1e0
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff812b7cfa>] blk_sq_make_request+0x9a/0x380
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff812aa56f>] ? generic_make_request_checks+0x24f/0x380
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff812aa782>] generic_make_request+0xe2/0x130
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff812aa841>] submit_bio+0x71/0x150
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff811569ab>] ? unlock_page+0x2b/0x30
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffffa017bc55>] ext4_io_submit+0x25/0x50 [ext4]
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffffa0176ea2>] ext4_writepage+0x1f2/0x470 [ext4]
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff81156d51>] ? find_get_pages_tag+0xe1/0x1a0
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff81160d63>] __writepage+0x13/0x50
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff81161881>] write_cache_pages+0x251/0x4d0
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff81160d50>] ? global_dirtyable_memory+0x70/0x70
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff81161b4d>] generic_writepages+0x4d/0x80
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffffa0140499>] jbd2_journal_commit_transaction+0x489/0x19a0 [jbd2]
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff810aec1e>] ? account_entity_dequeue+0xae/0xd0
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff810ad756>] ? __dequeue_entity+0x26/0x40
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff810125c6>] ? __switch_to+0x136/0x4a0
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff8108007e>] ? try_to_del_timer_sync+0x5e/0x90
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffffa0145da9>] kjournald2+0xc9/0x260 [jbd2]
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff81098230>] ? wake_up_bit+0x30/0x30
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffffa0145ce0>] ? commit_timeout+0x10/0x10 [jbd2]
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff8109726f>] kthread+0xcf/0xe0
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff810971a0>] ? kthread_create_on_node+0x140/0x140
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff81614158>] ret_from_fork+0x58/0x90
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff810971a0>] ? kthread_create_on_node+0x140/0x140
[14765.843444] auditd          D ffff88007fc13680     0   498      1 0x00000000
[14765.843444]  ffff8800790bfe38 0000000000000086 ffff8800784138e0 ffff8800790bffd8
[14765.843444]  ffff8800790bffd8 ffff8800790bffd8 ffff8800784138e0 ffff880036b93800
[14765.843444]  0000000000002e01 ffff880036b93890 ffff880036b93828 ffff8800790bfe80
[14765.843444] Call Trace:
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffff816096a9>] schedule+0x29/0x70
[14765.843444]  [<ffffffffa0145785>] jbd2_log_wait_commit+0xc5/0x140 [jbd2]

item.summary: sanity-quota test_7e: test failed to respond and timed out

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are closed can be reopened.

comments.comment: it's a dup of LU-4950
